body_transformation: Hitmonlee's compact rounded body now features smooth, scale-covered skin in deep ocean blue with subtle aquamarine highlights along the limbs. The pale cream limb accents transform into pearlescent white, shimmering with seafoam green undertones. Gills replace the original dark gray shading, appearing as delicate, translucent slits along the neck. The curled tail tip evolves into a streamlined fin-like extension with a soft aquamarine glow, maintaining its spiral shape but now covered in smooth, flexible scales.
signature_feature: Tail fin: seamless scale-covered extension with aquamarine glow and seafoam green edge detailing.
